name: content-stats
title: Content Stats
description: A content section with an intro, a grid of icon features, and a stats list, installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: Intro above a grid of icon features and a list of headline stats.

paragraphs.text: Our assistant helps you create better content faster — generate ideas, improve your writing, and design layouts with simple prompts.

features.title: Generate ideas
features.description: Spark creativity with AI-powered content suggestions and inspiration.

features.title: Improve writing
features.description: Enhance your text with smart editing suggestions and style refinements.

features.title: Design layouts
features.description: Create visually appealing layouts that capture your audience's attention.
